bindings.title: Carbon & Compute Ledger
bindings.excerpt: The main board opens into Grove's attempt to make enterprise AI emissions legible as an operational accounting problem.
bindings.source_title: Grove Launches New Open-Source Approach to Sustainable AI Measurement
bindings.source_summary: A saved source on treating AI emissions as something estimable, reportable, and governable inside normal business operations.

bindings.title: Resolver Routing Wall
bindings.excerpt: The routing wall opens into a browser-automation AXI implementation, making orchestration and tool routing feel infrastructural instead of metaphorical.
bindings.source_summary: A saved GitHub implementation of AXI ideas for browser automation, useful as a concrete routing and tool-surface reference.

bindings.title: Carbon Calculation Worksheet
bindings.excerpt: The worksheet binds the room to AXI's argument that cheaper, better-routed agent interfaces reduce waste before sustainability becomes branding.
bindings.source_summary: A saved source on token-efficient agent-facing interface design and why MCP-style overhead compounds into cost and waste.

bindings.title: Request Receipt
bindings.excerpt: The receipt strip turns structured output into an accountability object, tied to the TOON spec's compact notation logic.
bindings.source_summary: A saved spec for token-oriented structured output that makes machine-readable traces smaller and easier to route.

bindings.title: Transparency Packets
bindings.excerpt: The folder opens to a warning that sustainability AI can still become polished greenwashing when evidence and uncertainty go soft.
bindings.source_title: Algorithmic greenwashing: Lessons from building an AI agent for nature
bindings.source_summary: A saved article about how sustainability-oriented AI systems can sound persuasive without enough evidence or epistemic restraint.

bindings.title: Daily Checks Clipboard
bindings.excerpt: The checklist clipboard binds the room to the reference repo where AXI's practical benchmarking and implementation details actually live.
bindings.source_summary: A saved GitHub repo for AXI with benchmarks, SDK code, and the concrete reference implementation behind the theory.

bindings.title: Routing Notes Panel
bindings.excerpt: The routing-notes card points to a narrower proof: GitHub operations rethought as an agent-native CLI surface instead of a heavy schema swamp.
bindings.source_summary: A saved reference implementation showing how AXI principles apply in a concrete GitHub-operations workflow.

bindings.title: Receipt Printer Strip
bindings.excerpt: The printed strip opens into the broader TOON framing: lower-overhead machine structure as an environmental and operational choice.
bindings.source_summary: A saved overview page for TOON as a compact structured-output format meant to cut unnecessary token overhead.
